original: a leather set of vest & chaps
context: <<POS:05865067>> e.description='a leather set of vest & chaps'

original: These leather clothes are designed to cover your chest and legs, and only your chest and legs. Assless and crotchless, the chaps are completely reliant on the wearer's undergarments to cover his or her genitals... or not, as the case may be. The vest zips up for adjustable cleavage or pectoral display and has outer buttons to hide the zipper for a fully-rustic look, and the inner layer of both is made of tough, polymerized silk to prevent chafing. The set comes with stylish cowboy boots, too.
